transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi, is this Michael Torres?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Yes, speaking.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi Michael, this is Jordan from Riverside Realty. You recently inquired about homes in the area — is this still something you're actively pursuing?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Yes, we're looking to buy within the next few months.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great timing! To make sure I show you the right properties, can I ask what price range you're comfortable with?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: We're pre-approved up to $550,000.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Excellent, that opens up some great options in this market. And are there any specific neighborhoods or school districts you're targeting?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: We want good schools — we have two kids. The Westfield district would be ideal.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Perfect. Westfield has some great inventory right now. What's your ideal move-in timeline — 30, 60, or 90 days?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: We'd like to be in by end of summer, so maybe 60 days.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: That's very doable. I have three properties in Westfield within your budget that I'd love to show you. Are you free Saturday morning or Sunday afternoon?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Saturday morning works great.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Wonderful! Let's say Saturday at 10am. I'll send you the property addresses and a calendar invite. Looking forward to meeting you, Michael!

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi, this is Jordan from Riverside Realty. May I speak with Sandra Lee?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: This is Sandra.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi Sandra! You inquired about properties through our website. Are you currently in the market to buy?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Yes, we are. My husband and I have been looking for a while now.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Exciting! What's your comfortable purchase price range, and have you been pre-approved?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: We're pre-approved for $480,000 and would prefer to stay around $450,000 if possible.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: That's a very workable range. Are you flexible on location, or do you have specific areas in mind?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: We're open, but prefer something with a bit of yard space. We have a dog.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Noted — I have a few listings with good-sized yards that I think you'd love. Are you looking to move in the next 30 days or is this more of a 60-90 day search?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: We're not in a rush but would love to find something in the next two months.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Perfect. Can you do a showing this Thursday at 5pm or next Saturday at 11am?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Thursday at 5 works for us.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thursday at 5pm is confirmed! I'll send over details for two properties with yard space. Really looking forward to it!

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi, is this Robert Chang?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Yeah, who's this?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi Robert, this is Jordan from Riverside Realty. You reached out about buying a home. Is that still on your radar?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Yeah, but I'm worried about the market right now. Everything seems so overpriced.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I understand that concern. What price range were you hoping to stay in?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Honestly, $350,000 is about our max. But everything I see is way above that.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: The market is competitive, I won't sugarcoat it. There are some properties at that range though.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: What about down payment requirements? We only have about $25,000 saved up. Is that going to be a problem?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: That might be tight depending on the property. It's hard to say without knowing more.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: So you can't really help us then.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I wouldn't say that. Let me see what we have. Can I call you back with some options?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Sure, I guess. But honestly we might just wait it out a bit longer.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Good morning! Is this Emily Watson?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Yes, hi.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi Emily, Jordan here from Riverside Realty. You inquired about homes in the area — still actively looking?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Sort of. I'm not sure we can really afford this market. We're seeing prices that are just out of reach.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: What range are you working with?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Around $400,000. But everything decent seems to start at $500,000 or more.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: There are some options in that range in certain neighborhoods. It depends on what you're flexible on.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Are you able to show us anything under $420,000 that isn't completely run-down?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I'd have to check current inventory. It's a bit limited at that price point right now.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Honestly it sounds like we're probably priced out. We'll keep renting for now.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I understand. The market is challenging. Feel free to reach out when you're ready to revisit.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi, is this Daniel Foster?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Yes, speaking.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi Daniel! Jordan from Riverside Realty — you inquired about buying. Are you still in the market?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Yes, we are. We're primarily looking for a place that gives us more space — I work from home now and really need a dedicated home office. And my wife wants a proper garden.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sounds great! What's your budget range?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: We're pre-approved up to $520,000.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Good range for this market. Do you have preferred neighborhoods?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: We're fairly open — Riverside or Elmwood would both work.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: And what's your timeline?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Within the next 60 days ideally.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I have showings available Friday at 4pm or Saturday at 10am. Which works?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Saturday at 10am would be great.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Perfect! Saturday at 10am. I'll send you some listings to review beforehand.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi, is this Carmen Diaz?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Yes, hi!

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi Carmen! This is Jordan from Riverside Realty. I'd love to show you some properties. Can you do a showing this week?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Sure, maybe. What areas do you cover?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: We cover most of the greater Riverside area. What neighborhoods interest you?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Probably Elmwood or Oak Hills. What's the price range like there?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Both are great. I have some listings I think you'd like. Can you do Thursday at 6pm or Saturday at 2pm?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Thursday at 6 works.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thursday at 6pm, confirmed! I'll send over the property details.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi, is this Patrick Sullivan?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Yes. Look, now is not a great time.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I understand — I'll just take a minute of your time. You inquired about homes in the area—

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Sorry, I have to go. I'll call back when I'm ready.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi, may I speak with Grace Holland?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: That's me. What's this about?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi Grace, Jordan from Riverside Realty. You inquired about buying a home. I wanted to follow up.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: We did, months ago. Our last realtor completely wasted our time with bad listings and then disappeared.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I'm really sorry to hear that experience. I'd love the chance to do better. What went wrong with the previous process?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: They kept showing us properties way over our budget and wouldn't listen when we said what we actually needed.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: That's completely unacceptable. I always start by understanding exactly what you need and your firm budget. Would you be willing to give us a chance?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: I don't know. We're pretty burned at this point. Maybe. I'd need to talk to my husband first.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Of course, totally understand. Here's my direct number — whenever you're ready, no pressure at all.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi, is this Victor Morales?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Yes.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi Victor! Jordan from Riverside Realty. You reached out about buying a property. Are you still in the market?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Yes, but our situation is a little complicated. We're in the middle of a divorce and trying to figure out how to purchase a property in just my name going forward.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I see, that is a bit more complex. Do you have a sense of your budget?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: I will once the settlement is finalized but that's still a few weeks out. Can I still start looking?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Honestly there are some legal and financial nuances here that I'm not fully equipped to advise on. I want to make sure you're protected.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: So what do you suggest?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Let me connect you with our senior agent who handles more complex purchase situations. They'd be better placed to guide you through this properly.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Okay, that would be helpful actually. Thank you.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Good morning, is this Helen Zhao?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Yes, speaking.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi Helen! Jordan from Riverside Realty. You inquired about homes in the area. Are you actively looking?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Yes, we are. We've been looking for about a month.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great. What price range are you working with, and are you pre-approved?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Pre-approved up to $600,000. We'd rather stay around $550,000.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Excellent. Any preferred neighborhoods or specific requirements?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: We want good schools and at least 3 bedrooms. We have a toddler and are planning on another.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: That's completely doable in your range. Are you thinking 30 or 60 days for move-in?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: 60 days ideally.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I have three ideal properties in Westfield — great schools and 3+ bedrooms. Can you do a showing this Saturday at 11am?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Saturday works perfectly.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Saturday at 11am confirmed! I'll email you the listings tonight so you can preview. Looking forward to it, Helen!
